title: Craft and Conquer
description: Craft and Conquer is a curated lightweight-to-midweight modpack focused on exploration, rewarding combat, immersive villages, and enhanced vanilla survival.
body: Craft & Conquer enhances vanilla survival with new towns, towers, biomes, dungeons, and a refreshed Nether, while expanding combat, progression, and trading through improved gear upgrades, better loot, and deeper villager interactions. The pack supports creative building with decorative blocks, furniture, round trees, and armor trims, smooths gameplay with smart inventory tools, backpacks, automation, and XP protection, and elevates visuals with optional shaders, enhanced textures, and improved animations—all built on a lightweight, Fabric-based foundation for stability and performance.
